texto: I learned that dying is just a part of our journey of life. We are all on this journey and dying is a part of it for each of us. That does not mean that hope is hone. Hope just changes to a very realistic, practical hope... Sometimes hope becomes more beautiful than ever in our lives because it is about hope for the present moment and hope that is natural, such as, 'I hope the sun shines today'.
explicacao: Citação de Joyce Hutchinson sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “I learned that dying is just a part of our journey of life. We are all on this journey and dying …” articula tempo, death, dying em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como luto e mudanca.
